patch:
--- a/crates/bevy_pbr/src/deferred/mod.rs
+++ b/crates/bevy_pbr/src/deferred/mod.rs
@@ -345,6 +345,7 @@
         bevy_core_pipeline::core_3d::graph::Node3d::StartMainPass,
         NodePbr::DeferredLightingPass,
         bevy_core_pipeline::core_3d::graph::Node3d::MainOpaquePass,
+        bevy_core_pipeline::core_3d::graph::Node3d::Prepare,
     ),
 );
 
@@ -433,6 +434,7 @@
     pub struct DeferredLightingLayout {
         pub bind_group_layout_1: BindGroupLayout,
         pub bind_group_layout_2: BindGroupLayout,
+        pub bind_group_layout_3: BindGroupLayout,
     }
 
     impl Default for DeferredLightingLayout {
@@ -462,6 +464,19 @@
                 .descriptor(BindGroupDescriptor::empty()),
             )
+            .add(
+                BindGroupEntry {
+                    binding: 17,
+                    resource: BindingResource::Buffer(BufferBinding {
+                        buffer: Buffer::new(render_device, BufferUsage::UNIFORM),
+                        offset: 0,
+                        size: None,
+                    }),
+                    visibility:ShaderStages::FRAGMENT,
+                },
+            )
             .build()
         );
--- a/crates/bevy_pbr/src/deferred/mod.rs
+++ b/crates/bevy_pbr/src/deferred(mod.rs
@@ -507,6 +520,12 @@
         &view_ssr_offset,
         &view_environment_map_offset,
         &mesh_view_bind_group,
+        // Add new bind group entry for binding 17
+        render_context.render_device().create_bind_group(
+            "deferred_lighting_layout_group_3",
+            &deferred_lighting_layout.bind_group_layout_3,
+            &BindGroupEntries::single(deferred_lighting_pass_id_binding),
+        ),
         target,
         deferred_lighting_id_depth_texture,
         deferred_lighting_pipeline,
